title: quercus sessilis var. angulata
intro: Quercus sessilis var. angulata, also known as the angle-leaved sessile oak, is a variety of deciduous tree native to Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of tannins and flavonoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Quercus sessilis var. angulata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, often used in traditional Japanese medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
